assertion_results.text: Duplicate check searches for sibling issues using JQL with the CVE label and excludes the current issue key (Step 4)
assertion_results.evidence: In duplicate-check.md, Section 4.0 shows the JQL query: "project = TC AND labels = 'CVE-2026-31812' AND issuetype = 10024 AND key != TC-8003". This searches using the CVE label (CVE-2026-31812) and excludes the current issue key (key != TC-8003).

assertion_results.text: Duplicate check correctly classifies TC-7999 as a same-stream sibling (both have stream suffix [rhtpa-2.2]) and identifies it as a duplicate (Step 4.1)
assertion_results.evidence: In duplicate-check.md, Section 4.1 states: 'TC-7999 is a same-stream sibling of TC-8003. Both track CVE-2026-31812 for the identical product stream (2.2.x).' The stream comparison shows both TC-8003 and TC-7999 have stream suffix [rhtpa-2.2] mapping to stream 2.2.x. The heading reads 'Duplicate Classification: SAME-STREAM DUPLICATE'.

assertion_results.text: Triage outcome recommends closing TC-8003 as Duplicate with resolution 'Duplicate', referencing TC-7999 as the original (Step 4.1)
assertion_results.evidence: In triage-outcome.md: 'Decision: Close as Duplicate of TC-7999'. Under Proposed Jira Mutations: 'Transition: Close (transition to Closed status)' and 'Resolution: Duplicate'. TC-7999 is explicitly referenced as the original issue throughout.

assertion_results.text: The close recommendation includes a comment documenting why it is a duplicate — same CVE tracked for the same stream (Step 4.1)
assertion_results.evidence: In duplicate-check.md and triage-outcome.md, the proposed comment reads: 'Duplicate of TC-7999 -- same CVE (CVE-2026-31812) tracked for the same stream [rhtpa-2.2]. TC-7999 is already In Progress with Affects Versions [RHTPA 2.2.0, RHTPA 2.2.1], which is a superset of this issue's Affects Versions [RHTPA 2.2.0]. Version impact analysis confirms complete overlap. No additional remediation work is needed from this issue.'

assertion_results.text: The analysis does NOT proceed to remediation task creation — duplicate detection short-circuits the triage flow
assertion_results.evidence: In duplicate-check.md: 'Short-Circuit: Steps 4.2, 4.3, 4.4, 5, 6, 7 Skipped' with explicit note 'Step 7 (Remediation) -- skipped; no remediation tasks are created because TC-7999 already handles this CVE for the same stream. Duplicate detection short-circuits the triage flow before remediation.' In triage-outcome.md: 'No remediation tasks created -- all remediation is handled via TC-7999.' and Step 7 is listed as 'Skipped' with reason 'Duplicate detection short-circuits -- no remediation tasks created'.
